objective: Lift the T3B-VQUAD-EXCL-PEGZ3 (Q-linear, V_quad^1 only) exclusion to a polynomial-in-V_quad exclusion of degree ≤ 3, by running PSLQ on two complementary bases at two precision tiers each.
rationale_for_two_bases: The user (Claude) named T2' textually as 'Q-linear exclusion of V_quad over {V_quad^k : k=0..3} ∪ {classical monomials deg ≤ 2}' and described this as 'the smallest test that would catch a polynomial relation between V_quad and the classicals'. The strict union reading (18 elements) catches polynomial-in-V_quad relations whose corrections are Q-linear in classical monomials but NOT cross-products like V_quad·π. The tensor product reading (60 elements) catches the full bipartite-degree-(3,2) polynomial P(V_quad, π, e, G, ζ(3)) = 0. We run both and report each separately, so the certificate is unambiguous about what is and is not excluded.
scope_note: Both tests use maxcoeff = 10^4 (same as predecessor cycle, for direct comparability). Lifting maxcoeff to 10^6 is named as a separate follow-up cycle if both tests here return NULL.

nodes.description: Reload V_quad from predecessor artifact, verify SHA-256 match, parse to mpf at 2200 dp, cross-check against fresh CF computation at depth 6000
nodes.success_predicate: agreement_digits ≥ 2000 vs fresh CF recomputation; SHA-256 of reloaded string matches predecessor

nodes.description: Enumerate union basis B_union = {V_quad^k : k∈3} ∪ {π^a e^b G^c ζ(3)^d : a+b+c+d ≤ 2}, dedupe '1'
Enumerate tensor basis B_tensor = {V_quad^k * π^a e^b G^c ζ(3)^d : k=0..3, a+b+c+d ≤ 2}
PSLQ B_union at 500 dp, tol 10^-450, maxcoeff 10^4, maxsteps 2000
nodes.success_predicate: result is None OR a stable candidate

nodes.description: PSLQ B_union at 2050 dp, tol 10^-1970, maxcoeff 10^4, maxsteps 4000
PSLQ B_tensor at 500 dp, tol 10^-450, maxcoeff 10^4, maxsteps 2000
nodes.success_predicate: result is None OR a stable candidate

nodes.description: PSLQ B_tensor at 2050 dp, tol 10^-1970, maxcoeff 10^4, maxsteps 4000 (longest tier)
Emit exclusion_certificate.json with verdicts for both bases and a combined verdict (joint NULL => stronger exclusion)
nodes.success_predicate: certificate present, verdict is one of {EXCLUSION_CERTIFIED, PENDING_VERIFICATION, GOLD_FREEZE, ABORTED}

nodes.description: Append AEAL claims for each tier-result + combined verdict
report.md with TARGET, evidence table, honest verdict, next-cycle recommendation
nodes.success_predicate: report.md present with exactly one verdict tag

nodes.description: STANDING FINAL STEP: handoff.md, fetch-only check, stage only this directory, commit, push
nodes.success_predicate: push succeeded OR BRIDGE_FAILED zip emitted

halt_conditions: PSLQ returns conflicting candidates at 500 dp and 2050 dp on the same basis (UNSTABLE_NOISE)
Any computation produces NaN, inf, or negative precision residual
If a STABLE_CANDIDATE survives both tiers on either basis: HALT and emit candidate-relation artefact; do NOT escalate language; route to Stage-4 symbolic check before any binding
